# terrible_community_general_udm_dns_record (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Name of the record, this is also the DNS record. For example `www` for www.example.com. For PTR records this has to be the IP address.
- `type` (String) Define the record type. `host_record` is a A or AAAA record, `alias` is a CNAME, `ptr_record` is a PTR record, `srv_record` is a SRV record and `txt_record` is a TXT record. The available choices are: `host_record`, `alias`, `ptr_record`, `srv_record`, `txt_record`.
- `zone` (String) Corresponding DNS zone for this record, for example `example.com`. For PTR records this has to be the full reverse zone (for example `1.1.192.in-addr.arpa`).

### Optional

- `data` (String) Additional data for this record, for example `{'a': '192.0.2.1'}`. Required if `state=present`.
- `state` (String) Whether the DNS record is present or not.
